citations.snippet_text: Regularization Practical tips: вҖў DonвҖҷt regularize the bias term (only the weights) вҖ“ Why? Allows model to be invariable a shift in the y-values вҖў Standardize data (convert to z-scores) вҖ“ For each feature: subtract the mean across the dataset and divide by the standard deviation вҖ“ Why? reply_sections.heading: Grounded answer
reply_sections.text: The provided materials explain how to compute the partial derivative of the cost function with respect to the weights, which is a component of the weight update. However, the materials do not explicitly state or explain why the weight update itself is negative.
